boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: agency office request mismatch.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current jurisdiction and office authority match

critical_features_preserved: current jurisdiction and office authority match
final_answer: Control record confirms exact match on jurisdiction authority scope and boundary. Policy requires only closed source records for execution. Current sources bind precisely with no defects. Action proceeds. No escalation needed from sensitivity notes or adjacent context.
